ddls:
CREATE TABLE "code_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL of the code repository */,
  "lead_developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead developer for the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "actual_cost" REAL /* Actual cost incurred for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_projects_lead_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the file belongs to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time the file was last modified */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file */,
  "file_encoding" TEXT /* Encoding of the file */,
  "file_hash" TEXT /* Hash value of the file for integrity checks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_files_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES code_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file the metric belongs to */,
  "branch_count" INTEGER /* Branch count of the code */,
  "loc_code_and_comment" INTEGER /* Lines of code and comments */,
  "loc_comments" INTEGER /* Lines of comments */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the metrics were collected */,
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commit related to the metrics */,
  "code_coverage" REAL /* Code coverage percentage */,
  "cyclomatic_complexity" REAL /* Cyclomatic complexity value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_metrics_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES code_commits ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_metrics_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES code_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cyclomatic_complexity" (
  "complexity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each complexity metric */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric the complexity belongs to */,
  "complexity_value" REAL /* Value of the cyclomatic complexity */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the complexity metric was collected */,
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commit related to the complexity metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("complexity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cyclomatic_complexity_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES code_commits ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cyclomatic_complexity_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES code_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "halstead_metrics" (
  "halstead_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Halstead metric */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric the Halstead metric belongs to */,
  "content" REAL /* Content of the Halstead metric */,
  "difficulty" REAL /* Difficulty of the Halstead metric */,
  "effort" REAL /* Effort of the Halstead metric */,
  "error_est" REAL /* Error estimate of the Halstead metric */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the Halstead metric */,
  "level" REAL /* Level of the Halstead metric */,
  "prog_time" REAL /* Program time of the Halstead metric */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the Halstead metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the Halstead metrics were collected */,
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commit related to the Halstead metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("halstead_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_halstead_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES code_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_halstead_metrics_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES code_commits ("commit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loc_metrics" (
  "loc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each LOC metric */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric the LOC metric belongs to */,
  "loc_code" INTEGER /* Lines of code */,
  "loc_comments" INTEGER /* Lines of comments */,
  "loc_total" INTEGER /* Total lines of code */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the LOC metrics were collected */,
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commit related to the LOC metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loc_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES code_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loc_metrics_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES code_commits ("commit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operand_metrics" (
  "operand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operand metric */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric the operand metric belongs to */,
  "num_operands" INTEGER /* Number of operands */,
  "num_unique_operands" INTEGER /* Number of unique operands */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the operand metrics were collected */,
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commit related to the operand metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operand_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES code_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operand_metrics_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES code_commits ("commit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operator_metrics" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator metric */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric the operator metric belongs to */,
  "num_operators" INTEGER /* Number of operators */,
  "num_unique_operators" INTEGER /* Number of unique operators */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the operator metrics were collected */,
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commit related to the operator metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operator_metrics_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES code_commits ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operator_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES code_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "defectiveness" (
  "defect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each defectiveness metric */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric the defectiveness metric belongs to */,
  "defectiveness" TEXT /* Defectiveness of the code (Y/N) */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the defectiveness metrics were collected */,
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commit related to the defectiveness metrics */,
  "defect_count" INTEGER /* Number of defects found */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("defect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defectiveness_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES code_commits ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defectiveness_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES code_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Name of the developer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the developer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the developer */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the developer belongs to */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the developer was hired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the review belongs to */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who performed the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the review */,
  "review_type" TEXT /* Type of review */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review */,
  "review_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_reviews_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES code_projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_reviews_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code_commits" (
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commit */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the commit belongs to */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who made the commit */,
  "commit_date" TEXT /* Date of the commit */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Message describing the commit */,
  "commit_type" TEXT /* Type of commit */,
  "commit_status" TEXT /* Status of the commit */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Hash value of the commit for integrity checks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_commits_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_commits_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES code_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code_issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the issue belongs to */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who reported the issue */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date of the issue */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "issue_type" TEXT /* Type of issue */,
  "issue_status" TEXT /* Status of the issue */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_issues_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES code_projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_issues_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)
